name: relay-codex
description: Keep Codex moving on your project without losing state.

interface.shortDescription: Repo-local state, drift detection, and recovery for Codex
interface.longDescription: Relay for Codex turns Codex App into a project relay system with repo-local state, progress verdicts, stuck-project recovery, and automation pack recommendations for long-running work.
defaultPrompt: Check whether Codex is stuck and what to do next
Install automations to keep this project moving
